videos.headline: Kevin Jennings connects with Brashard Smith for a Mustangs TD
videos.description: Kevin Jennings passes it to Brashard Smith, who walks into the end zone for a 31-6 SMU lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kevin Jennings connects with Brashard Smith for a Mustangs TD) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Preston Stone finds Key'Shawn Smith for a 40-yard TD to seal SMU's win
videos.description: Preston Stone connects for 40-yard TD pass

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Preston Stone connects for 40-yard TD pass) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kevin Jennings extends a play for an SMU TD
videos.description: Kevin Jennings spins out of a sack and throws a great pass to Matthew Hibner for an SMU touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kevin Jennings extends a play for an SMU TD) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: SMU's Brashard Smith rushes for a 5-yard touchdown
videos.description: Brashard Smith runs up the middle of Cal's defense to give SMU a 14-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (SMU’s Brashard Smith rushes for a 5-yard touchdown) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Derrick McFall walks in for an SMU TD
videos.description: Derrick McFall puts the Mustangs up 21-0 with a 8-yard rushing touchdown.
